title: Altunizade South Campus
content:
By clicking on the headings below,

you can easily access relevant contents in the field.

Related Faculties

Üsküdar University South Campus is located in Altunizade, one of the most central districts of Üsküdar.

The South Campus, where the Faculty of Communication, the Faculty of Humanities and Social Sciences and the Faculty of Health Sciences are located, has easy transportation with its location within walking distance to the Üsküdar-Çekmeköy Metro and the metrobus.

Üsküdar University South Campus provides education in its building on Altunizade Mahallesi Mahir İz Street.

Address

TRANSPORTATION BY METROBUS Transportation by Metrobus; It provides convenience for our students coming from the European and Anatolian sides. After getting off at Altunizade station and descending to the road via overpasses, walk 5 minutes along Mahir İz Street to reach Üsküdar University South Campus (opposite Capitol).

Transportation by Ferry and Motorboat

Depart from Beşiktaş and Eminönü piers and arrive at Üsküdar Pier by sea transportation. Kadıköy buses and minibuses from Üsküdar Square get off in front of Bağlarbaşı Capitol.

Arrival by Private Vehicle

Arriving from D-100 - Edirne/Topkapi Direction:

After crossing the Bosphorus Bridge (after 1,750 meters), take the Üsküdar-Kadıköy Turnoff (the second exit after the Bosphorus Bridge). Continue on the left side of Kısıklı Street and take the first left turn after entering Nuh Kuyusu Street. After 100 meters, arrive at the South Campus on the left.

D-100 - Arrival from Ankara Direction:

Take the last exit Altunizade-Üsküdar-Ümraniye before reaching the Bosphorus Bridge. Continue left at the intersection. After entering Nuh Kuyusu Street by continuing on the left side of Kısıklı Street, take the first left turn. After 100 meters, arrive at the South Campus on the left.

Arrival from TEM Highway:

Take the Ümraniye-Üsküdar exit and continue straight on without leaving the highway. After passing through Çamlıca Tunnel and Altunizade Bridge, continue along Kısıklı Street and take the first left turn after entering Nuh Kuyusu Street. After 100 meters, you will reach the South Campus on the left.

*** Our direction signs that can help you in and around Altunizade are hanging on the electricity poles.

You can reach the events of the university from the link:

https://uskudar.edu.tr/tr/etkinlik-takvimi
